channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Alibaba rolls out AI model, claiming it’s better than DeepSeek-V3
item.description: Chinese tech company Alibaba on Wednesday released a new version of its Qwen 2.5 artificial intelligence model that it claimed surpassed the highly-acclaimed DeepSeek-V3.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Verizon Business Launches AI Connect: Revolutionizing Generative AI Workloads
item.description: Verizon Business has launched AI Connect, an integrated suite of products designed to deploy generative artificial intelligence workloads at scale.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta posts sharply higher Q4 profit, revenue, topping Wall Street's expectations
item.description: Meta Platforms Inc. posted sharply higher profit and revenue for its fourth quarter on Wednesday, thanks to higher ad revenue on its social media properties.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: AI assistants for lawyers are a booming business—with big risks
item.description: Illinois lawyer Mathew Kerbis markets himself as the Subscription Attorney, charging businesses and individual clients a monthly rate for legal advice and offering additional services like contract review and legal document drafting for a flat fee.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI investigating whether DeepSeek improperly obtained data
item.description: OpenAI is examining whether Chinese artificial intelligence (AI) startup DeepSeek improperly obtained data from its models to build a popular new AI assistant, a spokesperson confirmed to The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Google Pixel 9 Pro may have a serious design issue, with some units literally peeling apart
item.description: Multiple users have reported issues with the Google Pixel 9 Pro’s camera bar, which in the most serious cases is physically separating from the phone’s chassis – and Google doesn’t seem too enthusiastic about fixing things.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: iPhones on T-Mobile can access Starlink satellite communications
item.description: Starlink support appears to be a secret iOS 18.3 feature for iPhones, some of which now support satellite communication services from SpaceX — but only for users invited to join public beta testing of the service on US carrier T-Mobile.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Rumors that RTX 5090 GPU review models are somehow faster than retail boards are shot down by Nvidia
item.description: Nvidia has assured PC gamers that the RTX 5090 GPU they buy at retail won’t somehow be slower than review models, as some rumors have suggested.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 3 exceptional text expansion tools for Windows
item.description: Do you find yourself typing the same things over and over? If the answer is yes — and if you type enough text during the workweek, it almost certainly will be — I’d highly recommend you install a text expansion application.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nvidia's RTX 5080 might be only slightly faster than the RTX 4080 Super without DLSS, if this leaked review is genuine
item.description: Don't overreact just yet, but an early review hints at the RTX 5080 potentially making only slight performance jumps over the RTX 4080 Super.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Hideaki Nishino is now the sole CEO of Sony Interactive Entertainment, Hermen Hulst remains CEO of PlayStation Studios
item.description: Sony has announced that Hideaki Nishino has been promoted to sole CEO of Sony Interactive Entertainment as part of a new leadership restructuring.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: World’s largest pulp manufacturer streamlined SAP S/4HANA integration for better outcomes
item.description: Cloud-based enterprise resource planning solutions are transforming and enhancing business operations. Yet despite the organisational benefits, businesses are slow to modernise IT, citing challenges in integrating legacy systems due to change management and user adoption issues.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The biggest ideas in software and technology today
item.description: One of the coolest things about being a software developer is that you often know what’s behind the curtain. To some extent, at least.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Innovation through Cloud ERP: Wipro, SAP, and Microsoft Partner to Transform Businesses
item.description: Wipro, SAP, and Microsoft collaborate to help businesses transform into intelligent enterprises through cloud ERP adoption, reducing costs and enhancing operational efficiency.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Reimagine Enterprise Productivity with Wipro’s Custom Approach for Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: Most people know that using an AI companion at work can be an effective productivity tool, helping boost efficiency and outcomes. But what many may not realise is that when used to its full potential, an AI companion can also boost creativity by providing newer perspectives to existing issues.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tecnología y negocio en el ámbito industrial, la convergencia de dos imprescindibles para Cerealto
item.description: Sobre los hombros de Juan Manuel García Dujo, actual Chief Information Officer (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés) de Cerealto, recae la misión de alinear las TI con los objetivos de negocio.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Boom Supersonic’s XB-1 breaks the sound barrier—the first private aircraft to do so
item.description: About 35,000 feet (10,670 meters) over the Mojave Desert, northwest of Los Angeles, Boom Supersonic’s XB-1 became the first privately funded airplane to break the sound barrier during a test flight on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Now US government agencies can use OpenAI’s ChatGPT too
item.description: Everyone wants to get their hands on AI tools, and employees in government agencies are no exception. Still, stakes are far higher for governments when it comes to security, privacy, and protecting the public.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: UK regulator may investigate AWS and Microsoft cloud businesses
item.description: AWS and Microsoft could potentially face an investigation of their cloud businesses in Britain should the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) follow the recommendation of an independent inquiry group that reports into the UK’s antitrust regulator.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: OpenAI announces more secure ChatGPT for government workers, Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI on Tuesday announced a new ChatGPT system for U.S. government workers that it calls more secure than its Enterprise offering. ChatGPT Gov will allow for government agencies to feed nonpublic, sensitive data into the platform while operating in their own hosting environments.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Unknown threat actor targeting Juniper routers with backdoor: Report
item.description: Network administrators using routers from Juniper Networks are being urged to scan for possible compromise after the discovery that an unknown threat actor has been installing a backdoor in customer routers since at least 2023.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Crooks can't steal this motorcycle that hides in plain sight
item.description: A nondescript metal box transforms into a fully functional electric motorcycle that blurs the line between vehicle and urban infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
